title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 522.190 - Judgment, how rendered
text:
522.190.  Judgment, how rendered. — If judgment be rendered on any such bond, such judgment shall be rendered for the sum really due, according to such condition, with interest and costs, and execution shall issue thereon accordingly.
(RSMo 1939 § 3266) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2879; 1919 § 1029; 1909 § 1236
